title: ephedra coryi
intro: Ephedra coryi, also known as Mormon tea, is a type of shrub native to the southwestern regions of North America, belonging to the Ephedraceae family. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to act as a bronchodilator, diuretic, and stimulant, due to the presence of ephedrine and pseudoephedrine compounds. The health benefits of Ephedra coryi include relief from respiratory issues such as asthma and bronchitis, as well as its potential to aid in weight loss and improve mental clarity. Ephedra coryi is often prepared as a tea or infusion, which can be consumed hot or cold, or in capsule form as a dietary supplement.
